---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Propose a new feature, improvement, or idea for the ATHLIX platform.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
Provide a clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...").

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Target User Roles
Which user roles will benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Athlete
- [ ] Coach
- [ ] Academy Owner
- [ ] Tournament Organizer
- [ ] Admin

## Additional Context
Add any other context, designs, or mockups about the feature request here.
